    Method
    Description
    Column
    KeyColumn.column()
    Returns the value of the column record component.
    Column
    Table.findColumn(String name)
    Finds a column by name using case-insensitive comparison.

    Method
    Description
    List<Column>
    Table.columns()
    Returns the value of the columns record component.
    List<Column>
    Table.filteredColumns()
    Returns a list of columns excluding auto-increment columns.

  • Uses of Column in io.bloviate.ext

    Methods in io.bloviate.ext with parameters of type Column
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    DataGenerator<?>
    GeneratorFactory.create(Column column, RandomGenerator random)
    Creates a generator for the given column.
    final DataGenerator<?>
    AbstractDatabaseSupport.getDataGenerator(Column column, RandomGenerator random)
     
    DataGenerator<?>
    DatabaseSupport.getDataGenerator(Column column, RandomGenerator random)
    Creates an appropriate data generator for the given column based on its JDBCType (and, where relevant, its database-specific type name).
    DataGenerator<?>
    GeneratorRegistry.resolve(Column column, RandomGenerator random)
    Resolves the custom generator for a column, honouring the documented precedence (name pattern > vendor typeName > JDBCType).

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Column
    DatabaseUtils.getAssociatedPrimaryKeyColumn(Database database, Table table, Column column)
    Traverses foreign key relationships to find the root primary key column.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static long
    DatabaseUtils.columnSeed(Column column, long baseSeed)
    Computes a stable, reproducible generation seed for a column.
    static Column
    DatabaseUtils.getAssociatedPrimaryKeyColumn(Database database, Table table, Column column)
    Traverses foreign key relationships to find the root primary key column.
